                                                                                                                                  📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                  theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.residualCheckedApproxOrthogonalizer_success_iff {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (eps : α) (orthogonalizer : Optim.Muon.Orthogonalizer α (Spec.Shape.dim m (Spec.Shape.dim n Spec.Shape.scalar))) (buffer : MatrixTensor α m n) :
                                                                                                                                  (residualCheckedApproxOrthogonalizer eps orthogonalizer).Success buffer ↔ HasApproxColumnGram eps (orthogonalizer.apply buffer)

                                                                                                                                  The success predicate of a residual-checked backend is the approximate Gram certificate.

                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                  🔸 coverage
                                                                                                                                  @[reducible, inline]
                                                                                                                                  abbrev TorchLean.optim.muon.newtonSchulzResidualCheckedOrthogonalizer {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs α) (steps : ℕ) (eps : α) :
                                                                                                                                  CheckedApproxOrthogonalizer α m n eps

                                                                                                                                  Newton-Schulz packaged as a residual-checked approximate backend.

                                                                                                                                  Equations
                                                                                                                                  • TorchLean.optim.muon.newtonSchulzResidualCheckedOrthogonalizer coeffs steps eps = Optim.Muon.newtonSchulzResidualCheckedOrthogonalizer coeffs steps eps
                                                                                                                                  Instances For
                                                                                                                                    source
                                                                                                                                    📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                    theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.newtonSchulzResidualChecked_success_iff {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs α) (steps : ℕ) (eps : α) (buffer : MatrixTensor α m n) :
                                                                                                                                    (newtonSchulzResidualCheckedOrthogonalizer coeffs steps eps).Success buffer ↔ HasApproxColumnGram eps ((newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps).apply buffer)

                                                                                                                                    The success predicate of the Newton-Schulz residual-checked backend is the approximate Gram certificate for the Newton-Schulz output.

                                                                                                                                    source
                                                                                                                                    📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                    theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.newtonSchulzResidualChecked_zero_success_iff {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs α) (eps : α) (buffer : MatrixTensor α m n) :
                                                                                                                                    (newtonSchulzResidualCheckedOrthogonalizer coeffs 0 eps).Success buffer ↔ HasApproxColumnGram eps buffer

                                                                                                                                    For a zero-step Newton-Schulz backend, the residual checker is checking the raw momentum buffer.

                                                                                                                                    source
                                                                                                                                    🔹 coverage
                                                                                                                                    @[reducible, inline]
                                                                                                                                    abbrev TorchLean.optim.muon.NewtonSchulzFixedPoint {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs α) (buffer : MatrixTensor α m n) :
                                                                                                                                    Prop

                                                                                                                                    Predicate saying one column-oriented Newton-Schulz step fixes a buffer.

                                                                                                                                    Equations
                                                                                                                                    • TorchLean.optim.muon.NewtonSchulzFixedPoint coeffs buffer = Optim.Muon.NewtonSchulzFixedPoint coeffs buffer
                                                                                                                                    Instances For
                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.newtonSchulzFixedPoint_iff {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs α) (buffer : MatrixTensor α m n) :
                                                                                                                                      NewtonSchulzFixedPoint coeffs buffer ↔ Optim.Muon.newtonSchulzStep coeffs buffer = buffer

                                                                                                                                      A Newton-Schulz fixed point is exactly equality with one Newton-Schulz step.

                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.newtonSchulzIter_fixed_of_step_fixed {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs α) (steps : ℕ) (buffer : MatrixTensor α m n) (hfixed : NewtonSchulzFixedPoint coeffs buffer) :
                                                                                                                                      Optim.Muon.newtonSchulzIter coeffs steps buffer = buffer

                                                                                                                                      A one-step Newton-Schulz fixed point is fixed by every finite number of iterations.

                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer_fixed_apply {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs α) (steps : ℕ) (buffer : MatrixTensor α m n) (hfixed : NewtonSchulzFixedPoint coeffs buffer) :
                                                                                                                                      (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps).apply buffer = buffer

                                                                                                                                      A Newton-Schulz fixed point is returned unchanged by the corresponding orthogonalizer.

                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.newtonSchulzFixedPoint_exactOrthogonalizesBuffer {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs α) (steps : ℕ) (buffer : MatrixTensor α m n) (hgram : HasExactColumnGram buffer) (hfixed : NewtonSchulzFixedPoint coeffs buffer) :
                                                                                                                                      ExactOrthogonalizesBuffer (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) buffer

                                                                                                                                      If a buffer already has exact column Gram and is fixed by one Newton-Schulz step, then the finite-iteration Newton-Schulz backend exactly orthogonalizes that buffer.

                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                      🔸 coverage
                                                                                                                                      @[reducible, inline]
                                                                                                                                      abbrev TorchLean.optim.muon.newtonSchulzFixedPointCheckedExactOrthogonalizer {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs α) (steps : ℕ) :
                                                                                                                                      CheckedExactOrthogonalizer α m n

                                                                                                                                      Newton-Schulz as a checked exact backend for already-stable directions.

                                                                                                                                      Equations
                                                                                                                                      • TorchLean.optim.muon.newtonSchulzFixedPointCheckedExactOrthogonalizer coeffs steps = Optim.Muon.newtonSchulzFixedPointCheckedExactOrthogonalizer coeffs steps
                                                                                                                                      Instances For
                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                        📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                        theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.newtonSchulzFixedPointCheckedExact_success_iff {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs α) (steps : ℕ) (buffer : MatrixTensor α m n) :
                                                                                                                                        (newtonSchulzFixedPointCheckedExactOrthogonalizer coeffs steps).Success buffer ↔ HasExactColumnGram buffer ∧ NewtonSchulzFixedPoint coeffs buffer

                                                                                                                                        The fixed-point exact backend succeeds exactly under the explicit Gram/fixed-point predicate.

                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                        📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                        theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.newtonSchulzStep_eq_scale_sum_of_exact_column_gram {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs ℝ) (Q : MatrixTensor ℝ m n) (hgram : HasExactColumnGram Q) :
                                                                                                                                        Optim.Muon.newtonSchulzStep coeffs Q = Spec.Tensor.scaleSpec Q (coeffs.a + coeffs.b + coeffs.c)

                                                                                                                                        If QᵀQ = I, then one real column-oriented Newton-Schulz step returns (a + b + c) Q.

                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                        📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                        theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.scale_hasExactColumnGram_of_square_eq_one {m n : ℕ} (Q : MatrixTensor ℝ m n) (k : ℝ) (hgram : HasExactColumnGram Q) (hk : k * k = 1) :
                                                                                                                                        HasExactColumnGram (Spec.Tensor.scaleSpec Q k)

                                                                                                                                        Scaling an exact-column-orthogonal real matrix by k preserves exact Gram when k * k = 1.

                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                        📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                        theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.scale_hasApproxColumnGram_of_exact_column_gram_of_square_error {m n : ℕ} (Q : MatrixTensor ℝ m n) (k eps : ℝ) (hgram : HasExactColumnGram Q) (herr : MathFunctions.abs (k * k - 1) ≤ eps) (heps : 0 ≤ eps) :
                                                                                                                                        HasApproxColumnGram eps (Spec.Tensor.scaleSpec Q k)

                                                                                                                                        Scaling an exact-column-orthogonal real matrix gives an approximate Gram certificate when |k^2 - 1| is bounded by eps.

                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                        📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                        theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.newtonSchulzStep_hasExactColumnGram_of_exact_column_gram_of_sum_square_one {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs ℝ) (Q : MatrixTensor ℝ m n) (hgram : HasExactColumnGram Q) (hsquare : (coeffs.a + coeffs.b + coeffs.c) * (coeffs.a + coeffs.b + coeffs.c) = 1) :
                                                                                                                                        HasExactColumnGram (Optim.Muon.newtonSchulzStep coeffs Q)

                                                                                                                                        If QᵀQ = I and (a + b + c)^2 = 1, then one real Newton-Schulz step still has exact column Gram.

                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                        📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                        theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.newtonSchulzStep_hasApproxColumnGram_of_exact_column_gram_of_sum_square_error {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs ℝ) (Q : MatrixTensor ℝ m n) (eps : ℝ) (hgram : HasExactColumnGram Q) (herr : MathFunctions.abs ((coeffs.a + coeffs.b + coeffs.c) * (coeffs.a + coeffs.b + coeffs.c) - 1) ≤ eps) (heps : 0 ≤ eps) :
                                                                                                                                        HasApproxColumnGram eps (Optim.Muon.newtonSchulzStep coeffs Q)

                                                                                                                                        If QᵀQ = I and |(a + b + c)^2 - 1| ≤ eps, then one real Newton-Schulz step has entrywise Gram residual bounded by eps.

                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                        📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                        theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.newtonSchulzFixedPoint_of_exact_column_gram_of_coeff_sum_one {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs ℝ) (Q : MatrixTensor ℝ m n) (hgram : HasExactColumnGram Q) (hsum : coeffs.a + coeffs.b + coeffs.c = 1) :
                                                                                                                                        NewtonSchulzFixedPoint coeffs Q

                                                                                                                                        For real coefficients whose sum is one, an exact-column-orthogonal matrix is a fixed point of one column-oriented Newton-Schulz step.

                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                        📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                        theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.newtonSchulzFixedPointCheckedExact_success_of_coeff_sum_one {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs ℝ) (steps : ℕ) (buffer : MatrixTensor ℝ m n) (hgram : HasExactColumnGram buffer) (hsum : coeffs.a + coeffs.b + coeffs.c = 1) :
                                                                                                                                        (newtonSchulzFixedPointCheckedExactOrthogonalizer coeffs steps).Success buffer

                                                                                                                                        For real coefficients whose sum is one, exact column Gram is enough to satisfy the fixed-point checked backend's success predicate.

                                                                                                                                                HasApproxColumnGram eps direction

                                                                                                                                                An approximate certified step gives the residual bound for its certified direction.

                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.exactCertifiedStep_direction_eq {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} {state : Optim.Muon.State α (Spec.Shape.dim m (Spec.Shape.dim n Spec.Shape.scalar))} {params grads direction : MatrixTensor α m n} (hstep : ExactCertifiedStep state params grads direction) :
                                                                                                                                                direction = state.orthogonalizer.apply (Optim.Muon.update state params grads).1.buf

                                                                                                                                                An exact certified step identifies its certified direction with the backend output on the fresh momentum buffer.

                                                                                                                                                direction = state.orthogonalizer.apply (Optim.Muon.update state params grads).1.buf

                                                                                                                                                📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.exactCertifiedStep_state_eq {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} {state : Optim.Muon.State α (Spec.Shape.dim m (Spec.Shape.dim n Spec.Shape.scalar))} {params grads direction : MatrixTensor α m n} (hstep : ExactCertifiedStep state params grads direction) :
                                                                                                                                                (Optim.Muon.update state params grads).1 = { lr := state.lr, momentum := state.momentum, buf := Optim.OptimizerUtils.updateMomentumBuf state.buf state.momentum grads, orthogonalizer := state.orthogonalizer }

                                                                                                                                                An exact certified step gives the next-state equation for the Muon update.

                                                                                                                                                (Optim.Muon.update state params grads).1 = { lr := state.lr, momentum := state.momentum, buf := Optim.OptimizerUtils.updateMomentumBuf state.buf state.momentum grads, orthogonalizer := state.orthogonalizer }

                                                                                                                                                (Optim.Muon.update state params grads).2 = Spec.Tensor.subSpec params (Spec.Tensor.scaleSpec direction state.lr)

                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.qrCheckedExactOrthogonalizer_success_iff {m n : ℕ} (buffer : MatrixTensor ℝ m n) :
                                                                                                                                                      qrCheckedExactOrthogonalizer.Success buffer ↔ HasPositiveQRPivots buffer

                                                                                                                                                      The QR checked backend succeeds exactly when the executable QR pivots are positive.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.qrOrthogonalizer_exact_of_positive_pivots {m n : ℕ} (buffer : MatrixTensor ℝ m n) (hpivots : HasPositiveQRPivots buffer) :
                                                                                                                                                      Optim.Muon.ExactOrthogonalizesBuffer qrOrthogonalizer buffer

                                                                                                                                                      QR orthogonalization exactly satisfies the Muon buffer contract under positive QR pivots.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_exact_certified_direction {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (state : Optim.Muon.State α (Spec.Shape.dim m (Spec.Shape.dim n Spec.Shape.scalar))) (params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (horth : ExactMatrixOrthogonalizer state.orthogonalizer) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ExactCertifiedDirection state.orthogonalizer (Optim.Muon.update state params grads).1.buf direction ∧ (Optim.Muon.update state params grads).2 = Spec.Tensor.subSpec params (Spec.Tensor.scaleSpec direction state.lr)

                                                                                                                                                      Generic exact-backend Muon theorem: if the state's backend is exact for every matrix buffer, the update uses an exactly certified direction.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_exact_certified_direction_of_backend {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (backend : ExactCertifiedOrthogonalizer α m n) (lr momentum : α) (buf params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ExactCertifiedDirection backend.orthogonalizer (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := backend.orthogonalizer } params grads).1.buf direction ∧ (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := backend.orthogonalizer } params grads).2 = Spec.Tensor.subSpec params (Spec.Tensor.scaleSpec direction lr)

                                                                                                                                                      Generic exact-backend Muon theorem for packaged backends.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_exact_certified_step {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (state : Optim.Muon.State α (Spec.Shape.dim m (Spec.Shape.dim n Spec.Shape.scalar))) (params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (horth : ExactMatrixOrthogonalizer state.orthogonalizer) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ExactCertifiedStep state params grads direction

                                                                                                                                                      Generic exact-backend Muon theorem: if the state's backend is exact for every matrix buffer, the update has a certified step containing the direction certificate, next-state equation, and parameter-update equation.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_exact_certified_step_of_backend {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (backend : ExactCertifiedOrthogonalizer α m n) (lr momentum : α) (buf params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ExactCertifiedStep { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := backend.orthogonalizer } params grads direction

                                                                                                                                                      Generic exact-backend Muon theorem for packaged backends, returning the whole certified step.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_exact_certified_direction_of_buffer {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (state : Optim.Muon.State α (Spec.Shape.dim m (Spec.Shape.dim n Spec.Shape.scalar))) (params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (horth : ExactOrthogonalizesBuffer state.orthogonalizer (Optim.Muon.update state params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ExactCertifiedDirection state.orthogonalizer (Optim.Muon.update state params grads).1.buf direction ∧ (Optim.Muon.update state params grads).2 = Spec.Tensor.subSpec params (Spec.Tensor.scaleSpec direction state.lr)

                                                                                                                                                      Local exact-backend Muon theorem: it is enough to certify the fresh momentum buffer used by this one update.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_exact_certified_step_of_buffer {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (state : Optim.Muon.State α (Spec.Shape.dim m (Spec.Shape.dim n Spec.Shape.scalar))) (params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (horth : ExactOrthogonalizesBuffer state.orthogonalizer (Optim.Muon.update state params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ExactCertifiedStep state params grads direction

                                                                                                                                                      Local exact-backend Muon theorem returning the whole certified step from a certificate for the fresh momentum buffer used by this one update.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_exact_certified_direction_of_checked_backend {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (backend : CheckedExactOrthogonalizer α m n) (lr momentum : α) (buf params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hsuccess : backend.Success (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := backend.orthogonalizer } params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ExactCertifiedDirection backend.orthogonalizer (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := backend.orthogonalizer } params grads).1.buf direction ∧ (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := backend.orthogonalizer } params grads).2 = Spec.Tensor.subSpec params (Spec.Tensor.scaleSpec direction lr)

                                                                                                                                                      Generic checked-backend theorem for exact Muon: once the backend success predicate is established on the fresh momentum buffer, the update uses an exactly certified direction.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_exact_certified_step_of_checked_backend {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (backend : CheckedExactOrthogonalizer α m n) (lr momentum : α) (buf params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hsuccess : backend.Success (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := backend.orthogonalizer } params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ExactCertifiedStep { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := backend.orthogonalizer } params grads direction

                                                                                                                                                      Generic checked-backend theorem for exact Muon: backend success gives a certified step containing the direction certificate, next-state equation, and parameter-update equation.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_direction_has_exact_column_gram_of_checked_backend {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (backend : CheckedExactOrthogonalizer α m n) (lr momentum : α) (buf params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hsuccess : backend.Success (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := backend.orthogonalizer } params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      HasExactColumnGram (backend.orthogonalizer.apply (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := backend.orthogonalizer } params grads).1.buf)

                                                                                                                                                      Generic checked-backend theorem for exact Muon: backend success gives QᵀQ = I for the actual direction used by this update.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.init_has_exact_certified_direction_of_checked_backend {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (backend : CheckedExactOrthogonalizer α m n) (lr momentum : α) (params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hsuccess : backend.Success (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum backend.orthogonalizer params) params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ExactCertifiedDirection backend.orthogonalizer (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum backend.orthogonalizer params) params grads).1.buf direction ∧ (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum backend.orthogonalizer params) params grads).2 = Spec.Tensor.subSpec params (Spec.Tensor.scaleSpec direction lr)

                                                                                                                                                      Initialized checked-backend theorem for exact Muon: after init, backend success on the fresh momentum buffer certifies the direction used by the first update.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.init_has_exact_certified_step_of_checked_backend {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (backend : CheckedExactOrthogonalizer α m n) (lr momentum : α) (params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hsuccess : backend.Success (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum backend.orthogonalizer params) params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ExactCertifiedStep (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum backend.orthogonalizer params) params grads direction

                                                                                                                                                      Initialized checked-backend theorem for exact Muon: after init, backend success gives a certified first step.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.init_direction_has_exact_column_gram_of_checked_backend {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (backend : CheckedExactOrthogonalizer α m n) (lr momentum : α) (params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hsuccess : backend.Success (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum backend.orthogonalizer params) params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      HasExactColumnGram (backend.orthogonalizer.apply (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum backend.orthogonalizer params) params grads).1.buf)

                                                                                                                                                      Initialized checked-backend theorem for exact Muon: after init, backend success gives QᵀQ = I for the direction used by the first update.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_exact_certified_direction_newtonSchulz_fixed_checked {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs α) (steps : ℕ) (lr momentum : α) (buf params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hsuccess : (newtonSchulzFixedPointCheckedExactOrthogonalizer coeffs steps).Success (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps } params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ExactCertifiedDirection (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps } params grads).1.buf direction ∧ (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps } params grads).2 = Spec.Tensor.subSpec params (Spec.Tensor.scaleSpec direction lr)

                                                                                                                                                      Fixed-point checked Newton-Schulz theorem: backend success gives an exact certified direction for one Muon update.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_exact_certified_step_newtonSchulz_fixed_checked {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs α) (steps : ℕ) (lr momentum : α) (buf params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hsuccess : (newtonSchulzFixedPointCheckedExactOrthogonalizer coeffs steps).Success (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps } params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ExactCertifiedStep { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps } params grads direction

                                                                                                                                                      Fixed-point checked Newton-Schulz theorem: backend success gives an exact certified Muon step.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_newtonSchulz_fixed_direction_has_exact_column_gram_checked {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs α) (steps : ℕ) (lr momentum : α) (buf params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hsuccess : (newtonSchulzFixedPointCheckedExactOrthogonalizer coeffs steps).Success (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps } params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      HasExactColumnGram ((newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps).apply (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps } params grads).1.buf)

                                                                                                                                                      Fixed-point checked Newton-Schulz gives QᵀQ = I for the actual update direction.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.init_has_exact_certified_step_newtonSchulz_fixed_checked {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs α) (steps : ℕ) (lr momentum : α) (params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hsuccess : (newtonSchulzFixedPointCheckedExactOrthogonalizer coeffs steps).Success (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) params) params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ExactCertifiedStep (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) params) params grads direction

                                                                                                                                                      Initialized fixed-point checked Newton-Schulz gives an exact certified first Muon step.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.init_newtonSchulz_fixed_direction_has_exact_column_gram_checked {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs α) (steps : ℕ) (lr momentum : α) (params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hsuccess : (newtonSchulzFixedPointCheckedExactOrthogonalizer coeffs steps).Success (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) params) params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      HasExactColumnGram ((newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps).apply (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) params) params grads).1.buf)

                                                                                                                                                      Initialized fixed-point checked Newton-Schulz gives QᵀQ = I for the first update direction.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_exact_certified_step_newtonSchulz_exact_gram_checked {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs ℝ) (steps : ℕ) (lr momentum : ℝ) (buf params grads : MatrixTensor ℝ m n) (hgram : HasExactColumnGram (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps } params grads).1.buf) (hsum : coeffs.a + coeffs.b + coeffs.c = 1) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor ℝ m n), ExactCertifiedStep { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps } params grads direction

                                                                                                                                                      For real coefficients with a + b + c = 1, exact column Gram of the fresh momentum buffer is enough to certify a Newton-Schulz Muon update exactly.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_newtonSchulz_exact_gram_direction_has_exact_column_gram_checked {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs ℝ) (steps : ℕ) (lr momentum : ℝ) (buf params grads : MatrixTensor ℝ m n) (hgram : HasExactColumnGram (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps } params grads).1.buf) (hsum : coeffs.a + coeffs.b + coeffs.c = 1) :
                                                                                                                                                      HasExactColumnGram ((newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps).apply (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps } params grads).1.buf)

                                                                                                                                                      For real coefficients with a + b + c = 1, exact column Gram of the fresh momentum buffer gives QᵀQ = I for the actual Newton-Schulz update direction.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.init_has_exact_certified_step_newtonSchulz_exact_gram_checked {m n : ℕ} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs ℝ) (steps : ℕ) (lr momentum : ℝ) (params grads : MatrixTensor ℝ m n) (hgram : HasExactColumnGram (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) params) params grads).1.buf) (hsum : coeffs.a + coeffs.b + coeffs.c = 1) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor ℝ m n), ExactCertifiedStep (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) params) params grads direction

                                                                                                                                                      Initialized version: exact column Gram of the first fresh momentum buffer and a + b + c = 1 certify the first Newton-Schulz Muon step exactly.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_approx_certified_direction {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} {eps : α} (state : Optim.Muon.State α (Spec.Shape.dim m (Spec.Shape.dim n Spec.Shape.scalar))) (params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (horth : ApproxMatrixOrthogonalizer eps state.orthogonalizer) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ApproxCertifiedDirection eps state.orthogonalizer (Optim.Muon.update state params grads).1.buf direction ∧ (Optim.Muon.update state params grads).2 = Spec.Tensor.subSpec params (Spec.Tensor.scaleSpec direction state.lr)

                                                                                                                                                      Generic approximate-backend Muon theorem: if the state's backend has an entrywise Gram-residual bound for every matrix buffer, the update uses an approximately certified direction.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_approx_certified_direction_of_backend {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} {eps : α} (backend : ApproxCertifiedOrthogonalizer α m n eps) (lr momentum : α) (buf params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ApproxCertifiedDirection eps backend.orthogonalizer (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := backend.orthogonalizer } params grads).1.buf direction ∧ (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := backend.orthogonalizer } params grads).2 = Spec.Tensor.subSpec params (Spec.Tensor.scaleSpec direction lr)

                                                                                                                                                      Generic approximate-backend Muon theorem for packaged backends.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_approx_certified_step {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} {eps : α} (state : Optim.Muon.State α (Spec.Shape.dim m (Spec.Shape.dim n Spec.Shape.scalar))) (params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (horth : ApproxMatrixOrthogonalizer eps state.orthogonalizer) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ApproxCertifiedStep eps state params grads direction

                                                                                                                                                      Generic approximate-backend Muon theorem: if the state's backend is approximately orthogonalizing for every matrix buffer, the update has a certified step containing the residual-bounded direction, next-state equation, and parameter-update equation.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_approx_certified_step_of_backend {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} {eps : α} (backend : ApproxCertifiedOrthogonalizer α m n eps) (lr momentum : α) (buf params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ApproxCertifiedStep eps { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := backend.orthogonalizer } params grads direction

                                                                                                                                                      Generic approximate-backend Muon theorem for packaged backends, returning the whole certified step.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_approx_certified_direction_of_buffer {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} {eps : α} (state : Optim.Muon.State α (Spec.Shape.dim m (Spec.Shape.dim n Spec.Shape.scalar))) (params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (horth : ApproxOrthogonalizesBuffer eps state.orthogonalizer (Optim.Muon.update state params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ApproxCertifiedDirection eps state.orthogonalizer (Optim.Muon.update state params grads).1.buf direction ∧ (Optim.Muon.update state params grads).2 = Spec.Tensor.subSpec params (Spec.Tensor.scaleSpec direction state.lr)

                                                                                                                                                      Local approximate-backend Muon theorem: it is enough to certify the fresh momentum buffer used by this one update.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_approx_certified_step_of_buffer {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} {eps : α} (state : Optim.Muon.State α (Spec.Shape.dim m (Spec.Shape.dim n Spec.Shape.scalar))) (params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (horth : ApproxOrthogonalizesBuffer eps state.orthogonalizer (Optim.Muon.update state params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ApproxCertifiedStep eps state params grads direction

                                                                                                                                                      Local approximate-backend Muon theorem returning the whole certified step from a residual certificate for the fresh momentum buffer used by this one update.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_approx_certified_direction_of_checked_backend {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} {eps : α} (backend : CheckedApproxOrthogonalizer α m n eps) (lr momentum : α) (buf params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hsuccess : backend.Success (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := backend.orthogonalizer } params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ApproxCertifiedDirection eps backend.orthogonalizer (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := backend.orthogonalizer } params grads).1.buf direction ∧ (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := backend.orthogonalizer } params grads).2 = Spec.Tensor.subSpec params (Spec.Tensor.scaleSpec direction lr)

                                                                                                                                                      Generic checked-backend theorem for approximate Muon: once the backend success predicate is established on the fresh momentum buffer, the update uses an approximately certified direction.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_approx_certified_step_of_checked_backend {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} {eps : α} (backend : CheckedApproxOrthogonalizer α m n eps) (lr momentum : α) (buf params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hsuccess : backend.Success (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := backend.orthogonalizer } params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ApproxCertifiedStep eps { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := backend.orthogonalizer } params grads direction

                                                                                                                                                      Generic checked-backend theorem for approximate Muon: backend success gives a certified step containing the residual-bounded direction, next-state equation, and parameter-update equation.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_direction_has_approx_column_gram_of_checked_backend {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} {eps : α} (backend : CheckedApproxOrthogonalizer α m n eps) (lr momentum : α) (buf params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hsuccess : backend.Success (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := backend.orthogonalizer } params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      HasApproxColumnGram eps (backend.orthogonalizer.apply (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := backend.orthogonalizer } params grads).1.buf)

                                                                                                                                                      Generic checked-backend theorem for approximate Muon: backend success gives the residual bound for the actual direction used by this update.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.init_has_approx_certified_direction_of_checked_backend {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} {eps : α} (backend : CheckedApproxOrthogonalizer α m n eps) (lr momentum : α) (params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hsuccess : backend.Success (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum backend.orthogonalizer params) params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ApproxCertifiedDirection eps backend.orthogonalizer (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum backend.orthogonalizer params) params grads).1.buf direction ∧ (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum backend.orthogonalizer params) params grads).2 = Spec.Tensor.subSpec params (Spec.Tensor.scaleSpec direction lr)

                                                                                                                                                      Initialized checked-backend theorem for approximate Muon: after init, backend success on the fresh momentum buffer certifies the direction used by the first update.

                                                                                                                                                      source

                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.init_has_approx_certified_step_of_checked_backend {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} {eps : α} (backend : CheckedApproxOrthogonalizer α m n eps) (lr momentum : α) (params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hsuccess : backend.Success (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum backend.orthogonalizer params) params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ApproxCertifiedStep eps (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum backend.orthogonalizer params) params grads direction

                                                                                                                                                      Initialized checked-backend theorem for approximate Muon: after init, backend success gives a certified first step.

                                                                                                                                                      source
