                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.init_direction_has_approx_column_gram_of_checked_backend {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} {eps : α} (backend : CheckedApproxOrthogonalizer α m n eps) (lr momentum : α) (params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hsuccess : backend.Success (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum backend.orthogonalizer params) params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      HasApproxColumnGram eps (backend.orthogonalizer.apply (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum backend.orthogonalizer params) params grads).1.buf)

                                                                                                                                                      Initialized checked-backend theorem for approximate Muon: after init, backend success gives the Gram-residual bound for the direction used by the first update.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_approx_certified_direction_newtonSchulz_checked {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} {eps : α} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs α) (steps : ℕ) (lr momentum : α) (buf params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hresidual : ResidualApproxSuccess eps (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps } params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ApproxCertifiedDirection eps (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps } params grads).1.buf direction ∧ (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps } params grads).2 = Spec.Tensor.subSpec params (Spec.Tensor.scaleSpec direction lr)

                                                                                                                                                      Newton-Schulz checked theorem: if the backend output on the fresh momentum buffer satisfies the Gram-residual bound, Muon uses an approximately certified direction.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_approx_certified_step_newtonSchulz_checked {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} {eps : α} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs α) (steps : ℕ) (lr momentum : α) (buf params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hresidual : ResidualApproxSuccess eps (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps } params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ApproxCertifiedStep eps { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps } params grads direction

                                                                                                                                                      Newton-Schulz checked step theorem: if the backend output on the fresh momentum buffer satisfies the Gram-residual bound, Muon has a certified approximate step.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_newtonSchulz_direction_has_approx_column_gram_checked {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} {eps : α} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs α) (steps : ℕ) (lr momentum : α) (buf params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hresidual : ResidualApproxSuccess eps (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps } params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      HasApproxColumnGram eps ((newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps).apply (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps } params grads).1.buf)

                                                                                                                                                      Newton-Schulz checked direction theorem: if the backend output on the fresh momentum buffer satisfies the Gram-residual bound, the actual update direction satisfies that same bound.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.init_has_approx_certified_direction_newtonSchulz_checked {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} {eps : α} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs α) (steps : ℕ) (lr momentum : α) (params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hresidual : ResidualApproxSuccess eps (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) params) params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ApproxCertifiedDirection eps (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) params) params grads).1.buf direction ∧ (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) params) params grads).2 = Spec.Tensor.subSpec params (Spec.Tensor.scaleSpec direction lr)

                                                                                                                                                      Initialized Newton-Schulz checked theorem: if the first fresh momentum buffer satisfies the Gram-residual bound, Muon uses an approximately certified direction.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.init_has_approx_certified_step_newtonSchulz_checked {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} {eps : α} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs α) (steps : ℕ) (lr momentum : α) (params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hresidual : ResidualApproxSuccess eps (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) params) params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor α m n), ApproxCertifiedStep eps (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) params) params grads direction

                                                                                                                                                      Initialized Newton-Schulz checked step theorem: if the first fresh momentum buffer satisfies the Gram-residual bound, Muon has a certified approximate first step.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.init_newtonSchulz_direction_has_approx_column_gram_checked {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} {eps : α} (coeffs : NewtonSchulzCoeffs α) (steps : ℕ) (lr momentum : α) (params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (hresidual : ResidualApproxSuccess eps (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) params) params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      HasApproxColumnGram eps ((newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps).apply (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum (newtonSchulzOrthogonalizer coeffs steps) params) params grads).1.buf)

                                                                                                                                                      Initialized Newton-Schulz checked direction theorem: if the first fresh momentum buffer satisfies the Gram-residual bound, the first update direction satisfies that same bound.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_direction_has_exact_column_gram {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} (state : Optim.Muon.State α (Spec.Shape.dim m (Spec.Shape.dim n Spec.Shape.scalar))) (params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (horth : ExactMatrixOrthogonalizer state.orthogonalizer) :
                                                                                                                                                      HasExactColumnGram (state.orthogonalizer.apply (Optim.Muon.update state params grads).1.buf)

                                                                                                                                                      The exact backend contract gives QᵀQ = I for the direction used by the Muon update.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_direction_has_approx_column_gram {α : Type} [Context α] {m n : ℕ} {eps : α} (state : Optim.Muon.State α (Spec.Shape.dim m (Spec.Shape.dim n Spec.Shape.scalar))) (params grads : MatrixTensor α m n) (horth : ApproxMatrixOrthogonalizer eps state.orthogonalizer) :
                                                                                                                                                      HasApproxColumnGram eps (state.orthogonalizer.apply (Optim.Muon.update state params grads).1.buf)

                                                                                                                                                      The approximate backend contract gives the entrywise Gram-residual bound for the direction used by the Muon update.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_exact_certified_direction_qr {m n : ℕ} (lr momentum : ℝ) (buf params grads : MatrixTensor ℝ m n) (hpivots : HasPositiveQRPivots (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := qrOrthogonalizer } params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor ℝ m n), ExactCertifiedDirection qrOrthogonalizer (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := qrOrthogonalizer } params grads).1.buf direction ∧ (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := qrOrthogonalizer } params grads).2 = Spec.Tensor.subSpec params (Spec.Tensor.scaleSpec direction lr)

                                                                                                                                                      QR-backed Muon theorem: if the fresh momentum buffer has positive QR pivots, the executable Muon step uses a direction with exact column Gram I.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_has_exact_certified_step_qr {m n : ℕ} (lr momentum : ℝ) (buf params grads : MatrixTensor ℝ m n) (hpivots : HasPositiveQRPivots (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := qrOrthogonalizer } params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor ℝ m n), ExactCertifiedStep { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := qrOrthogonalizer } params grads direction

                                                                                                                                                      QR-backed Muon step theorem: if the fresh momentum buffer has positive QR pivots, the executable Muon step is exactly certified.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.update_qr_direction_has_exact_column_gram {m n : ℕ} (lr momentum : ℝ) (buf params grads : MatrixTensor ℝ m n) (hpivots : HasPositiveQRPivots (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := qrOrthogonalizer } params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      HasExactColumnGram (qrOrthogonalizer.apply (Optim.Muon.update { lr := lr, momentum := momentum, buf := buf, orthogonalizer := qrOrthogonalizer } params grads).1.buf)

                                                                                                                                                      QR-backed direction theorem: if the fresh momentum buffer has positive QR pivots, the actual Muon update direction has column Gram I.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.init_has_exact_certified_direction_qr {m n : ℕ} (lr momentum : ℝ) (params grads : MatrixTensor ℝ m n) (hpivots : HasPositiveQRPivots (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum qrOrthogonalizer params) params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor ℝ m n), ExactCertifiedDirection qrOrthogonalizer (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum qrOrthogonalizer params) params grads).1.buf direction ∧ (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum qrOrthogonalizer params) params grads).2 = Spec.Tensor.subSpec params (Spec.Tensor.scaleSpec direction lr)

                                                                                                                                                      Initialized QR-backed Muon theorem: if the first fresh momentum buffer has positive QR pivots, the first update uses a direction with exact column Gram I.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.init_has_exact_certified_step_qr {m n : ℕ} (lr momentum : ℝ) (params grads : MatrixTensor ℝ m n) (hpivots : HasPositiveQRPivots (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum qrOrthogonalizer params) params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (direction : MatrixTensor ℝ m n), ExactCertifiedStep (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum qrOrthogonalizer params) params grads direction

                                                                                                                                                      Initialized QR-backed Muon step theorem: if the first fresh momentum buffer has positive QR pivots, the first update is exactly certified.

                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                      📐 coverage
                                                                                                                                                      theorem TorchLean.optim.muon.init_qr_direction_has_exact_column_gram {m n : ℕ} (lr momentum : ℝ) (params grads : MatrixTensor ℝ m n) (hpivots : HasPositiveQRPivots (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum qrOrthogonalizer params) params grads).1.buf) :
                                                                                                                                                      HasExactColumnGram (qrOrthogonalizer.apply (Optim.Muon.update (Optim.Muon.init lr momentum qrOrthogonalizer params) params grads).1.buf)

                                                                                                                                                      Initialized QR-backed direction theorem: if the first fresh momentum buffer has positive QR pivots, the first update direction has column Gram I.
